stories.definitionOfDone: • Architecture Design: Design of the data processing and aggregation modules within the system.
stories.description: The system must perform local data processing and aggregation before transmitting data via satellite.
stories.testCases:
Test System Availability: Verify that the system is available to deliver insulin when required.
Test System Reliability: Verify that the system performs reliably and delivers the correct amount of insulin to counteract the current level of blood sugar.
Test Continuous Blood Sugar Monitoring: Verify that the system continuously monitors blood sugar levels using a microsensor embedded in the patient.
Test Automated Insulin Delivery: Verify that the system delivers an appropriate dose of insulin when needed, taking into account changes in blood glucose levels over time.
Test User Interface: Verify that the system provides a user-friendly interface to allow users to track their blood sugar levels and adjust settings as needed.
Test Safety Features: Verify that the system has built-in safety features to prevent pump failure and ensure safe operation, including alerts for high or low blood sugar levels.
Test Data Security: Verify that the system securely stores and transmits sensitive user data, including blood glucose levels and insulin dosing information.
Test Insulin Dose Adjustment: Verify that the system adjusts the dose of insulin delivered in response to changes in blood glucose levels.
Test Alert System: Verify that the system has an alert system to notify users of potential high or low blood sugar levels, allowing for timely intervention.
Test System Maintenance: Verify that the system is designed and implemented to ensure easy maintenance, updates, and troubleshooting.
stories.title: Perform Local Data Processing Aggregation

stories.definitionOfDone: • Unit Tests: Unit tests for reliability and accuracy of insulin dosing algorithms.
stories.description: The system shall perform reliably and deliver the correct amount of insulin to counteract the current level of blood sugar.
